lucidBlocksBeginnerGuide.title: MONGIL STAR DIVE Codes
lucidBlocksBeginnerGuide.intro: MONGIL STAR DIVE launched on April 15, 2026, and code redemption remains one of the fastest ways to claim extra launch rewards.

steps.title: MONGIL STAR DIVE Code: MONGILDISCORD
steps.description: Rewards: Free Diamond x30, Glimmering Stardust x30, and Gold x300,000. Redeem this first if your account is fresh.

steps.title: MONGIL STAR DIVE Code: LOVEMONGIL
steps.description: Rewards: Artifact "Overflowing Love". This code gives immediate value for early build flexibility.

steps.title: MONGIL STAR DIVE Redemption Status: Live
steps.description: In-game redemption is available on iOS, Android, and PC. Check expiration timing before each new patch cycle.

steps.title: MONGIL STAR DIVE Redeem Path
steps.description: Open the in-game code menu, enter the code exactly, claim from mailbox, then relog if rewards are delayed.

lucidBlocksQualiaAndBaseBuilding.title: MONGIL STAR DIVE Best Teams
lucidBlocksQualiaAndBaseBuilding.intro: These MONGIL STAR DIVE lineups cover launch bossing, budget progression, and mono-element plans built around current 1.0 synergy.

cards.name: Esther + Flare or Ellie + Jiwon
cards.description: Boss Focus: Esther drives finisher damage while Jiwon groups targets and Flare or Ellie add burst neutralization for fast stagger breaks.

cards.name: Sangun + Flare or Ellie + Jiwon
cards.description: Balanced Standard: Sangun takes the main fighter slot, Jiwon supports repositioning, and Flare or Ellie maintain strong neutralization pressure.

cards.name: Gabi + Flex + Francis
cards.description: Earth Core: Keep Gabi active while Francis supplies Earth affliction, healing, and Earth support; flex with Yeonhwa, Benjamin, Angel, or Esther.

cards.name: Verna or Sera or Ophelia + Cloud + Francis
cards.description: Budget Progression: A practical early lineup with Cloud and Francis as low-investment supports and Sera or Ophelia as stronger upgrades over Verna.

cards.name: Gabi + Ellie + Francis
cards.description: Mono Earth: Keeps Gabi and Francis synergy while adding Ellie's burst neutralization to improve boss control and elemental focus.

cards.name: Sangun + Esther + Jiwon
cards.description: Mono Wind: A premium Wind lineup that combines damage, grouping, and flexible pressure once your roster is built out.

MONGIL STAR DIVE balanced progression teams
MONGIL STAR DIVE Earth core team routes
MONGIL STAR DIVE budget-friendly early teams
MONGIL STAR DIVE mono Earth pressure teams

lucidBlocksWorldRegions.title: MONGIL STAR DIVE Best Builds
lucidBlocksWorldRegions.intro: These MONGIL STAR DIVE build picks summarize artifact and monsterling recommendations featured across current character pages.

regions.name: MONGIL STAR DIVE Flare Build
regions.description: Core artifact: Exquisite Dragon Fire. This setup improves multi-stat damage scaling and fits launch teams built around Esther or Sangun.

regions.name: MONGIL STAR DIVE Ophelia Build
regions.description: Core picks: Amon's Shadow for crit-support counters and Taglock for consecutive-hit attack boosts. Commonly paired with Cloud and Francis.

regions.name: MONGIL STAR DIVE Jiwon Build
regions.description: Core monsterling: Leafy Mama, which restores HP when she uses Special Skill and helps her maintain stable utility uptime in long fights.

regions.name: MONGIL STAR DIVE Francis Build
regions.description: Core picks: Overflowing Love plus Avardan to improve switch-based attack value, Earth attacker support, and burst charge consistency.

regions.name: MONGIL STAR DIVE Sangun Build
regions.description: Focus on survivability-aware Wind teams that keep Wind Affliction active, with Esther, Bonnie, and Jiwon as highlighted partners.

regions.name: MONGIL STAR DIVE Yeonhwa Build
regions.description: Core pick: Taglock for party attack boosts after consecutive hits, with Amon as an alternate option for crit-oriented pressure.

lucidBlocksCreaturesAndEnemies.title: MONGIL STAR DIVE Best Monsterlings
lucidBlocksCreaturesAndEnemies.intro: These MONGIL STAR DIVE Monsterlings stand out in launch builds because they provide broad crit, attack, weakness, or sustain value.

creatures.name: Amon's Shadow
creatures.description: Varhine. Effect: All teammates' Crit Rate +11.55% for 10s on Counter. A premier offensive support pick for counter-enabled teams.

creatures.name: Taglock
creatures.description: Elendor. Effect: ATK +5.5% for 10s after 20 successful attacks. Flexible on fast-hit characters and easy to trigger.

creatures.name: El Dorado Guardian
creatures.description: Elendor. Effect: Team ATK +5.78% for 10s after hitting a boss with elemental weakness. Excellent for boss-focused lineups.

creatures.name: Big Bro Goblin
creatures.description: Elendor. Effect: Restores 3.47% HP for all teammates after 10 Basic Attacks. A practical sustain option for early and midgame teams.

creatures.name: Monk's Shadow
creatures.description: Varhine. Effect: Elemental Weakness DMG +6.57% for 5s when hit. Useful for weakness-window and boss-pattern strategies.

creatures.name: Tealtaur
creatures.description: Varhine. Effect: Fire DMG +11.55%. A direct elemental-damage pick once you commit to Fire-focused team investment.

items.name: No.03 El Dorado Guardian

items.name: No.66 Tealtaur
items.description: Fire DMG +11.55%. Capture in Varhine for Fire-oriented lineups and elemental codex completion.

lucidBlocksFarmingAndGrowth.title: MONGIL STAR DIVE Artifacts
lucidBlocksFarmingAndGrowth.intro: Compare top MONGIL STAR DIVE artifacts by role, rarity, passive effect, and real user fit to plan stronger long-term builds.

artifacts.baseEffect: ATK increases by 10%. Using a Special Skill increases Wind DMG by 35% for 10s.
artifacts.fusionBonus: Fusion Lv.3 gains Crit Rate from Assassin proficiency. Fusion Lv.5 gains ATK from Assassin proficiency.
artifacts.whyUseIt: Best pure damage artifact for Wind Assassins and especially strong on Esther.

artifacts.baseEffect: Special Skill DMG increases by 10%. Landing an attack increases Crit DMG by 4% (max 2 stacks, duration 10s).
artifacts.fusionBonus: Fusion Lv.3 and Lv.5 increase ATK through Fighter proficiency scaling.
artifacts.whyUseIt: Flexible Fighter artifact for multiple on-field damage dealers when signature pieces are unavailable.

artifacts.baseEffect: Taking a hit increases Neutralization DMG by 5% for 10s (cooldown: 15s).
artifacts.fusionBonus: Fusion Lv.5 increases ATK through Destroyer proficiency scaling.
artifacts.whyUseIt: Reliable budget pick for Destroyers that emphasize stagger and neutralization pressure.

artifacts.baseEffect: Ultimate Skill DMG increases by 11%. Landing an attack increases all teammates' ATK by 6% for 15s.
artifacts.fusionBonus: Fusion Lv.3 and Lv.5 increase ATK through Support proficiency scaling.
artifacts.whyUseIt: Top generic Support artifact because its teamwide ATK buff fits many compositions.

artifacts.baseEffect: Using a Switch Skill grants Vitality to self and teammates. While Stamina is 90% or higher, Basic Attack, Special Skill, and Ultimate Skill DMG increase by 2.5% per second (max 20 stacks, duration 30s).
artifacts.whyUseIt: Premium stamina-based support artifact for lineups that maintain high Stamina uptime.

lucidBlocksBestEarlyUnlocks.title: MONGIL STAR DIVE Equipment Sets
lucidBlocksBestEarlyUnlocks.intro: Use this MONGIL STAR DIVE set overview to match element-focused builds with the right 2-piece and 4-piece bonuses.

sets.twoSet: When using ULT Skill, increases Fire Elemental DMG by 10% for 5s.
sets.fourSet: When attacking enemies with Fire Affliction, increases Crit DMG by 10%.
sets.useCase: Main Fire damage set for burst-oriented or affliction-enabled Fire units.

sets.twoSet: When Tag-Out Skill hits, reduces target Fire Elemental Resistance by 3% for 5s.
sets.fourSet: When attacking enemies with Fire Affliction, increases Fire Elemental DMG by 5%.
sets.useCase: Alternative Fire set for Tag-Out pressure and resistance shred routes.

sets.twoSet: When using Tag Skill, increases Ice Elemental DMG by 10% for 5s.
sets.fourSet: When attacking enemies with Ice Affliction, increases Ice Elemental DMG by 10%.
sets.useCase: Core Ice DPS set with consistent Tag interaction synergy.

sets.twoSet: When using SP Skill, increases Wind Elemental DMG by 10% for 5s.
sets.fourSet: On Critical Hit, increases Wind Elemental DMG by 10% for 5s.
sets.useCase: Top Wind set for crit-ready units and aggressive Wind lineups.

sets.twoSet: When using Normal Attack, increases Lightning Elemental DMG by 8% for 3s.
sets.fourSet: When attacking enemies with Lightning Affliction, increases Lightning Elemental DMG by 10%.
sets.useCase: Natural fit for Lightning units looping Normal Attacks with affliction uptime.

sets.twoSet: When using Normal Attack, increases Earth Elemental DMG by 8% for 3s.
sets.fourSet: When using Switch Skill against enemies with Earth Affliction, increases Earth Elemental DMG by 10% for 5s.
sets.useCase: Strong Earth option for repeated Normal Attack and Switch Skill windows.

setNotes: MONGIL STAR DIVE launch sets are strongest when they match natural affliction patterns.
MONGIL STAR DIVE set planning should prioritize 2-piece uptime before forcing 4-piece completion.
MONGIL STAR DIVE roster depth increases value of flexible element-aligned sets.

lucidBlocksSingleplayerAndPlatformFAQ.title: MONGIL STAR DIVE Release Date
lucidBlocksSingleplayerAndPlatformFAQ.intro: This MONGIL STAR DIVE release timeline tracks launch announcements, unlock timing, and current platform rollout status.

timeline.label: Global launch announcement
timeline.details: Netmarble announced April 15, 2026 as the release date for PC, iOS, and Android, with PC launch on the Netmarble Launcher and Epic Games Store.

timeline.label: First Dive Show livestream
timeline.details: The launch-week livestream reiterated release plans and confirmed PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X|S versions for a later date.

timeline.label: North America unlock time
timeline.details: The global service opened at 9:00 PM ET / 6:00 PM PT on April 14 for North America.

timeline.label: Worldwide launch
timeline.details: MONGIL STAR DIVE launched globally at 1:00 AM UTC for PC, Android, and iOS.

timeline.label: Console release status
timeline.details: PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X|S versions are confirmed, but launch date details are still pending.

platformSummary: Current MONGIL STAR DIVE platforms: PC, iOS, Android
Confirmed future MONGIL STAR DIVE platforms: PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S
North America launch timing: 2026-04-14 at 9:00 PM ET / 6:00 PM PT
Worldwide launch timing: 2026-04-15 at 1:00 AM UTC

lucidBlocksSteamDeckAndController.title: MONGIL STAR DIVE News
lucidBlocksSteamDeckAndController.intro: MONGIL STAR DIVE news should focus on official launch-week notices, maintenance outcomes, and livestream updates in one chronological feed.

items.label: Maintenance
items.headline: MONGIL STAR DIVE Temporary Maintenance Completed
items.summary: A temporary maintenance on April 16 stabilized service and fixed an issue where some field gathering and mining nodes did not reset correctly after daily reset.

items.label: Maintenance
items.headline: MONGIL STAR DIVE Emergency Launch-Day Maintenance
items.summary: Netmarble posted emergency maintenance notices on launch day to stabilize game servers during the initial global service window.

items.label: Launch
items.headline: MONGIL STAR DIVE Official Global Launch
items.summary: MONGIL STAR DIVE launched globally on April 15, 2026 at 1:00 AM UTC, which was April 14 at 9:00 PM ET, across PC, Android, and iOS.

items.label: Download
items.headline: MONGIL STAR DIVE Pre-Download and Specs Notice
items.summary: Netmarble published the pre-download schedule and minimum plus recommended specifications so players could prepare devices and storage before launch.

items.label: Showcase
items.headline: MONGIL STAR DIVE First Dive Show Livestream
items.summary: The First Dive Show livestream aired on April 8 as the main pre-launch update broadcast with release information and gameplay previews.

items.label: Q&A
items.headline: MONGIL STAR DIVE Developer Live Summary Q&A
items.summary: The official forum summary Q&A included early post-launch update cadence notes, including a three-week cycle for rate-up characters.

highlights: MONGIL STAR DIVE launched globally on 2026-04-15 at 01:00 UTC.
MONGIL STAR DIVE launch-week maintenance updates were published on 2026-04-15 and 2026-04-16.
MONGIL STAR DIVE First Dive Show and official Q&A on 2026-04-08 remain key pre-launch context.

lucidBlocksUpdatesAndPatchNotes.title: MONGIL STAR DIVE Best Settings
lucidBlocksUpdatesAndPatchNotes.intro: Use these MONGIL STAR DIVE presets to balance performance, combat readability, and control comfort across PC and mobile.

presets.title: MONGIL STAR DIVE PC High-End Preset
presets.description: For systems around recommended PC spec, prioritize full client image quality while keeping effects readable during dense combat. This preset fits Windows 11 systems with RTX 2060, RX 5700 XT, or Arc A750 class GPUs and 16 GB RAM.

presets.title: MONGIL STAR DIVE PC Stability Preset
presets.description: For minimum-spec PCs, lower graphics load first and prioritize stable battle performance. This preset fits Windows 10 systems around GTX 1060, RX 580, or Arc A380 class GPUs with 8 GB RAM.

presets.title: MONGIL STAR DIVE Mobile Performance Preset
presets.description: On mobile, prioritize smooth gameplay over visual intensity during crowded action scenes and tag-skill effects. Baseline devices start around iPhone 11 on iOS 15 or Snapdragon 865 on Android 10.

presets.title: MONGIL STAR DIVE Input Method Options
presets.description: MONGIL STAR DIVE supports mouse and keyboard, controller, and touchscreen by platform. PC players can swap between keyboard precision and controller comfort, while mobile players use touchscreen controls.

presets.title: MONGIL STAR DIVE Core Settings Checklist
presets.description: Review graphics, audio, language, and controls first whenever you switch between PC and mobile or optimize for stability.

presets.title: MONGIL STAR DIVE Best First Tweaks
presets.description: If launch performance feels heavy, reduce graphics load before touching other settings. If controls feel awkward, adjust input method and control layout for cleaner combat execution.

lucidBlocksCrashFixAndTroubleshooting.title: MONGIL STAR DIVE Crossplay
lucidBlocksCrashFixAndTroubleshooting.intro: MONGIL STAR DIVE crossplay guidance should separate cross-play and cross-save support from multiplayer expectations so account planning stays clear.

questions.question: Does MONGIL STAR DIVE support cross-play?
questions.answer: Yes. MONGIL STAR DIVE supports cross-play across supported launch platforms.

questions.question: Does MONGIL STAR DIVE support cross-save?
questions.answer: Yes. MONGIL STAR DIVE supports cross-save, so the same save data can be used across supported platforms.

questions.question: Which platforms are included in MONGIL STAR DIVE support?
questions.answer: MONGIL STAR DIVE launched on PC, Android, and iOS. The PC version is available through Epic Games and the Netmarble Launcher.

questions.question: Can I continue one MONGIL STAR DIVE account on PC and mobile?
questions.answer: Yes. MONGIL STAR DIVE cross-save support allows the same account progress to continue across PC and mobile.

questions.question: Is MONGIL STAR DIVE multiplayer confirmed at launch?
questions.answer: At launch, MONGIL STAR DIVE focuses on single-player progression centered on party building and tag-skill combat.

questions.question: What should MONGIL STAR DIVE players prioritize first?
questions.answer: If you mainly switch devices, prioritize account binding and cross-save continuity checks first, then follow official platform updates for future feature additions.

highlights: MONGIL STAR DIVE cross-play and cross-save are confirmed across launch platforms.
MONGIL STAR DIVE launch platforms are PC, Android, and iOS.
MONGIL STAR DIVE launch gameplay focuses on single-player party progression.

questions.question: What is MONGIL STAR DIVE?

questions.question: How do I redeem MONGIL STAR DIVE codes?
